item.title: MatthewBerryTMR: Matthew Berry @MatthewBerryTMR · 9min Cita Connor Rogers @ConnorJRogers · 19min I never got the sense Jordyn Tyson was i
item.description:
Matthew Berry @MatthewBerryTMR · 9min Cita Connor Rogers @ConnorJRogers · 19min I never got the sense Jordyn Tyson was in for a draft slide despite it often being discussed
He’s been WR1 on a lot of team boards throughout this process - and yes the workout today gives a little more comfort, but it didn’t take him from the bottom third of round 1 into top 10 3 5 11 mil

item.title: Pinnacle: Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 9min First round Stanley Cup Playoffs betting preview from @ByScottCullen is LIVE! pinnacle.com
item.description: Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 9min First round Stanley Cup Playoffs betting preview from @ByScottCullen is LIVE! pinnacle.com Stanley Cup 2026: First Round Betting Preview The puck drops on the Stanley Cup Playoffs starting on Saturday, April 18 and Scott Cullen looks at each first-round series with the best odds, including those for outright Stanley Cup winners, at... 142

item.title: Schultz_Report: Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 13min Oklahoma star WR Deion Burks ran a blazing 4.30 at the combine … and was disappoi
item.description:
Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 13min Oklahoma star WR Deion Burks ran a blazing 4.30 at the combine … and was disappointed!
“I wanted to see 4.2!” Cita Jordan Schultz @Schultz_Report · 2h 0:53 Oklahoma WR Deion Burks talks about how his late mother got him into playing football because he was an energetic kid.
“I was like Kofi Kingston.” 5 6 60 18 mil

item.title: NFLDraft: Around The NFL reposteó NFL Draft @NFLDraft · 19min Who will be selected at No. 2 overall? Which WR prospect flies off t
item.description:
Around The NFL reposteó NFL Draft @NFLDraft · 19min Who will be selected at No. 2 overall? Which WR prospect flies off the board first? What is QB Ty Simpson's draft range? With the 2026 NFL Draft nearly upon us, @BuckyBrooks answers seven burning questions.
https:// nfl.com/news/2026-nfl- draft-burning-questions-no-2-overall-pick-first-receiver-selected-ty-simpson-s-draft-range … 3 8 6 mil
